goal: Pick a real starter template for dual-arm pick-and-place, load it, add second Franka if needed.
thoughts: Never invent template names. list_scene_templates first. If a true dual-arm template exists use it; otherwise load tabletop_manipulation and add a second Franka via add_reference at a mirrored pose. Self-collision between arms is a separate filter step — do not claim it is automatic.
code:
list_scene_templates()

# Pick the best real match from that list
load_scene_template(template_name="<DUAL_ARM_OR_TABLETOP_MANIPULATION>")

# If single-arm template: mirror a second Franka
add_reference(
    prim_path="<SECOND_ARM_PRIM_PATH>",         # /World/Franka_02
    reference_path="<FRANKA_USD_ASSET>"
)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="<SECOND_ARM_PRIM_PATH>",
    attr_name="xformOp:translate",
    value=[<X_MIRROR>, 0.0, 0.0]
)

# Self-collision filter is NOT automatic — use configure_self_collision if asked
failure_modes: Inventing a 'dual_franka_handover' template that does not exist
Recommending UR10 swap as trivial — gripper + asset path differ
Assuming arms will auto-avoid collision — needs policy or planner
Overlapping base prim paths when adding the second arm
